final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3x3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 (Zhao Ling'er) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传 (Chinese Paladin / Legend of Sword and Fairy), rendered in 3D animation Pixar style.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style rendering, soft subsurface skin shading, expressive cartoon proportions, clean studio-quality finish
Subject: 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing dark hair, delicate fairy-like features, dressed in her iconic white and green hanfu-inspired outfits adapted per panel; consistent character model across all 9 panels
Composition: 3×3 grid of 9 equal panels, each character bust/torso shot peeking through a torn hole in white paper — the torn-paper frame is the shared motif across all panels; total 9 panels arranged in 3 rows × 3 columns
Color palette: soft pastel and jewel tones per panel outfit; white paper background unifies the grid; warm skin tones consistent throughout
Materials/textures: torn paper edges with visible fiber detail, smooth 3D skin, fabric texture on each outfit

Panel layout (row by row):
• Top-left — expression: winking | action: adjusting glasses | outfit: green sweater
• Top-center — expression: smirking | action: lowering dark sunglasses | outfit: red leather jacket
• Top-right — expression: thinking | action: finger on chin | outfit: yellow hoodie
• Middle-left — expression: big smile | action: arms resting on edge | outfit: black and white striped shirt
• Middle-center — expression: smiling | action: thumbs up | outfit: orange button-up shirt
• Middle-right — expression: neutral | action: drinking boba tea | outfit: blue sweater
• Bottom-left — expression: happy | action: waving | outfit: purple sweater vest over white shirt
• Bottom-center — expression: laughing with eyes closed | action: arms crossed | outfit: pink cardigan
• Bottom-right — expression: silly | action: poking cheeks | outfit: teal sweater

Constraints: all 9 panels must share the same character face and hair; torn-paper-hole framing must appear in every panel; grid must be evenly spaced with clean white gutters; character must be recognizable as 赵灵儿 across all expressions
Avoid: inconsistent face model between panels, generic anime face unrelated to 赵灵儿, cluttered backgrounds behind torn paper, text overlays, watermarks
